chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1703 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 28.08.2025 Mr. Kashif Nazir Baloch, Advocate for the applicant Syed Naimatullah Shah, Advocate for the complainant a/w the complainant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. SI/IO Fida Hussain of PS Surjani Town. ------------------------------- On 30.06.2025, the accused/applicant, Syed Ibad-ur-Rehman s/o Javed-ur-Rehman, was granted interim pre-arrest bail in FIR No.776/2025 under Section 324/34 PPC registered at P.S. Surjani Town, Karachi. His surety was furnished on 02.07.2025, and the accused was present in Court on the following two dates of hearing, i.e. 15.07.2025 and 04.08.2025, but thereafter, he remained absent on 21.08.2025 and, once again, today, 28.08.2025. Learned Counsel for Complainant submits that the above-named accused was thereafter taken into custody in another FIR, namely FIR No.366/2025 under Section 7 of ATA, 1997, registered at P.S. Sir Syed, Karachi, whereafter he has applied for post-arrest bail vide Criminal Bail Application 237/2025, which is pending hearing before the Anti-Terrorism Court. He contends that, as the accused in jail in Central Prison Karachi, this interim pre-arrest bail application has become infructuous. The learned counsel for the accused/applicant concedes that the interim pre-arrest bail application has become infructuous and requests permission to withdraw it and file a bail application afresh, as and when appropriate. The learned Counsel for Complainant and APG, Sindh, have no objection. Given the above, the bail application is dismissed as withdrawn in the above terms.
The learned Counsel for Complainant and APG, Sindh, have no objection. Given the above, the bail application is dismissed as withdrawn in the above terms. J U D G E Asif
